fields.description:
## Description

**What**: Migrate all runtime path constructions in .sh scripts under plugins/dso/scripts/ and plugins/dso/hooks/ to use _PLUGIN_ROOT for filesystem access. For git commands requiring repo-relative paths (git show, git diff --name-only), derive _PLUGIN_GIT_PATH from _PLUGIN_ROOT at runtime. Replace ALL plugins/dso references in code lines — no annotation bypass, no exceptions.
**Why**: Scripts that construct paths like $REPO_ROOT/plugins/dso/scripts/foo.sh fail in host projects where the plugin is installed at a different path.
**Scope**:
- IN: All runtime path constructions in .sh files under plugins/dso/ referencing sibling plugin files; all git-relative patterns (git show, git diff, case statements, grep patterns); user-facing error messages containing plugins/dso; config files (.conf, .json) with plugins/dso examples
- OUT: Comment lines in scripts (S1 complete); markdown files (S3); migration tooling at repo root

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, all .sh scripts under plugins/dso/ that reference sibling plugin files declare _PLUGIN_ROOT and use ${_PLUGIN_ROOT}/ for all filesystem path constructions
- When this story is complete, scripts needing git-relative paths derive _PLUGIN_GIT_PATH from _PLUGIN_ROOT at runtime and use it for git show, git diff filters, and case patterns
- When this story is complete, a test confirms _PLUGIN_ROOT resolves correctly from both shim context and direct invocation
- When this story is complete, grep -rn plugins/dso plugins/dso/ --include=*.sh returns zero matches on non-comment code lines — no annotation bypass, no exceptions
- When this story is complete, user-facing error messages use ${_PLUGIN_ROOT} instead of hardcoded plugins/dso paths
- When this story is complete, workflow-config-schema.json example values use generic paths instead of plugins/dso

## Considerations

- [Testing] Validate _PLUGIN_ROOT from both CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT set and direct invocation contexts
- [Testing] Validate _PLUGIN_GIT_PATH derivation produces correct repo-relative path
- [Scope boundary] Migration tooling must be created at repo root (scripts/), not under plugins/dso/
- [Ordering] S1 migration script (migrate_comment_refs.py) must be deleted from plugins/dso/ before S2 verification test can pass
